pi_items.source: Task description line specifies 'Subject: Weekly Sales Standup' and verifier.py line 37-38 searches for events with name='Weekly Sales Standup'
Task description specifies 'Time: 09:00 AM' which is equivalent to 09:00:00 in 24-hour format. Verifier.py line 104-106 checks if event_dt.hour == 9 and event_dt.minute == 0

Task description specifies 'Recurrence: Repeat Weekly'. Verifier.py line 119 checks for 'FREQ=WEEKLY' in rrule or 'WEEKLY' in rrule.upper(), which is the RFC 5545 standard format for weekly recurrence
Task description specifies 'Description: Review pipeline progress and blockers.' Verifier.py line 130 checks for both 'pipeline' and 'blocker' keywords in description (case-insensitive match)

Task environment is a local Odoo CRM instance (localhost:8069) with a local database 'odoodb'. Setup_task.sh cleans existing events and the agent creates a new calendar event via Odoo XML-RPC during task execution. No external data source is used.

privileged_info_summary: The schedule_recurring_standup task requires creating a calendar event in a local Odoo CRM instance with these verified specifications: subject is 'Weekly Sales Standup', time is 09:00 AM (09:00:00 in 24-hour format), recurrence is set to WEEKLY (RFC 5545 format: FREQ=WEEKLY), and description must contain 'Review pipeline progress and blockers.' All metadata values match the task requirements exactly. The task operates on synthetic data in a local Odoo instance running on localhost:8069 with database 'odoodb'.
